# Implementation Plan: Update Grayline Terminator

**Branch**: `006-update-grayline-terminator` | **Date**: 2026-05-18 | **Spec**: `specs/006-update-grayline-terminator/spec.md`

**Input**: Feature specification from `specs/006-update-grayline-terminator/spec.md`

**Note**: This plan was generated by the `/speckit.plan` workflow through Phase 1 design.

## Summary

Add a subtle current grayline terminator layer to the existing WSPR map and refresh it at least every 5 minutes while the map is visible. Hidden/backgrounded sessions conserve work and request a catch-up refresh within 1 second when visible again, preserving map position, callsign, base map, WSPR data, selected path details, controls, analytics behavior, support links, and version status.

## Technical Context

**Language/Version**: TypeScript 6.x with React 19 for the frontend; Python 3.11+ backend remains unchanged.

**Primary Dependencies**: Existing Vite 8, React, MapLibre GL JS, deck.gl MapboxOverlay, deck.gl layers, Vitest, Testing Library, and Playwright. No new production dependency is required.

**Storage**: No new persistence. Existing localStorage for map view and preferences remains unchanged.

**Testing**: Frontend ESLint, TypeScript typecheck, Vitest unit/component coverage, Playwright UI checks, and frontend build. Backend checks are not in scope because no backend change is planned.

**Target Platform**: Browser-based WSPR map on desktop and mobile-sized viewports.

**Project Type**: Web application with Vite React frontend and FastAPI static/API host.

**Performance Goals**: Grayline refresh completes without focus changes, map position resets, zoom resets, or open-control dismissal; visible sessions refresh at least 6 times in 30 minutes; stale visibility-return refresh is requested within 1 second.

**Constraints**: Refresh at least every 5 minutes while visible; request a refresh within 1 second when a hidden/backgrounded tab becomes visible with an overlay at least 5 minutes stale; no constant animation; no reset of map view, callsign, WSPR data, selected path details, selected base map, controls, support links, analytics behavior, or version status; no custom analytics events; no historical replay, future preview, manual time controls, propagation prediction, new production dependency, or external calculation service.

**Scale/Scope**: One main map overlay, one current observation time, one recurring refresh cadence, desktop and mobile viewports. Scope is frontend-only; no backend dependency is planned.

## Constitution Check

*GATE: Must pass before Phase 0 research. Re-check after Phase 1 design.*

- **User-Centric UX**: PASS. The overlay updates automatically without user action and must not interrupt map interaction or obscure existing controls.
- **Community-Driven Extensibility**: PASS. The plan isolates terminator calculation and refresh cadence into small frontend boundaries so future replay or configuration can be added without rewriting the map shell.
- **Automated Quality Assurance**: PASS. The plan requires unit/component tests for geometry, cadence, visibility-return behavior, map-state preservation, and UI smoke checks while maintaining 100% coverage.

## Project Structure

### Documentation (this feature)

```text
specs/006-update-grayline-terminator/
├── plan.md              # This file (/speckit.plan command output)
├── research.md          # Phase 0 output (/speckit.plan command)
├── data-model.md        # Phase 1 output (/speckit.plan command)

├── contracts/           # Phase 1 output (/speckit.plan command)
└── tasks.md             # Phase 2 output (/speckit.tasks command - NOT created by /speckit.plan)
```

### Source Code (repository root)
```text
frontend/
├── src/
│   ├── components/
│   │   ├── WsprMap.tsx
│   │   └── WsprMap.test.tsx
│   ├── services/
│   │   ├── terminator.ts
│   │   └── terminator.test.ts
│   └── test/
│       └── setup.ts
└── tests/
    └── ui/
        └── map-ui.spec.ts
```

**Structure Decision**: Use the existing frontend map component and service structure. Terminator geometry/time calculations belong in `frontend/src/services` for direct unit coverage; rendering and cadence wiring belong in `frontend/src/components/WsprMap.tsx`; UI smoke coverage remains in existing Playwright tests and must include desktop and mobile-sized viewports. No backend files are expected to change.

- `specs/006-update-grayline-terminator/quickstart.md`

## Post-Design Constitution Check

- **User-Centric UX**: PASS. Design keeps the overlay subordinate to paths and controls, refreshes without new controls, avoids constant animation, and preserves map state during scheduled and visibility-return updates.
- **Community-Driven Extensibility**: PASS. Design separates calculation, refresh cadence, and map rendering contracts so future time controls or additional propagation context can be added behind clear boundaries.
- **Automated Quality Assurance**: PASS. Design includes required unit/component/UI checks and keeps 100% coverage expectations explicit.
